app.title: Air Quality Monitor
app.subtitle: Measurements from stations in the selected country and year.

labels.title: Title
labels.historicalYear: Closed year — historical data, not live-monitored

noSelection.title: Select a country and year
noSelection.body: To see measurements, pick a country and a year above.

noData.title: No data for this selection
noData.body: There are no measurements for this country and year. Try a different year.

error.title: Couldn't load data
error.body: An error occurred while fetching measurements.

storageError.title: Notes storage unavailable
storageError.body: The browser database that holds your notes could not be opened. It may be corrupted, or blocked by private-browsing mode.
storageError.tip: Clearing the local notes database fixes this in most cases — the original sample notes are restored afterwards.

invalidCity.title: Invalid city
invalidCity.body: No city specified in the URL.

mockDb.resetBody: This deletes the notes saved in your browser and restores the original sample notes. Air-quality measurements are not affected.

faultMode.label: Error simulation
faultMode.description: Pick which mock endpoints fail with 503 to test the unhappy path.

empty.title: No notes yet
empty.body: Add the first context note for this city.

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: A couple of quick choices and you're in.
onboarding.countryHeading: Where do you want to look?
onboarding.yearSubtitle: The current year updates live; earlier years are archived snapshots.
onboarding.citySubtitle: Optional — open a city's pollution trend and notes, or skip to the full table.
onboarding.skipCity: Pick none to land on the full dashboard table.
